articles.author: Scharon Harding
articles.title: DJI sues the FCC for “carelessly” restricting its drones - Ars Technica
articles.description: DJI lawsuit says company has been "severely harmed by the FCC’s ruling."

articles.author: Andres Picon
articles.title: Trump to announce data center energy deals during State of the Union - Politico
articles.description: The agreements with tech companies could help lower energy bills as parties spar about affordability concerns.
articles.content: Trump is expected to announce that top tech companies have pledged to pay more for electricity in areas where they are building new data centers, which use enormous amounts of energy and sometimes wa… [+1999 chars]
